violations.text: The door to the outside and side window panel, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2026
First air circulating fan at second walk-in cooler evaporator was not functional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2026
Several floor tiles in the walk-in cooler and by front door were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Establishment does not have an individual certified with the Rhode Island Certified Food Safety Manager license. Establishment has 2 individuals with food safety certificate. PIC to register, application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025

The room where the 3 bay sink is does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
